name: io.github.mustafatokmak/container-mcp
description: MCP server for Apple containers — run AI agents in VM-isolated sandboxes on your Mac. Every container is its own VM; network is denied and mounts are allowlisted by default.

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_ALLOWED_MOUNTS
environmentVariables.description: Colon-separated allowlist of host paths agents may mount, copy to/from, or build from. Default: the launch directory plus a private per-process scratch dir. Setting it replaces the default.

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to allow only listing, logs, and status — all mutating tools are disabled. Default: off.

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_ALLOW_NETWORK
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to allow containers outbound network access. Default: off (containers run with --network none).

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_DEFAULT_CPUS
environmentVariables.description: CPU limit applied when the agent does not specify one. Default: 2.

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_DEFAULT_MEMORY
environmentVariables.description: Memory limit applied when the agent does not specify one. Default: 2g.

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_MAX_CONTAINERS
environmentVariables.description: Maximum concurrent containers run_container will create. Default: 10.

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_AGENT_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Value of the dev.container-mcp.agent label stamped on created containers. Default: agent.

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Base CLI timeout in milliseconds. Image pulls/builds and wait-mode runs get 600000 automatically. Default: 120000.

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_MCP_ALLOW_UNMANAGED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to allow lifecycle operations on containers not created by this server. Default: off (fail-closed managed-label scoping).
